sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67730" key="mikrologhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρο-λογητέον</orth>, <sense id="n67730.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must be niggardly</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔν τινι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.822a</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
